data.title: Not All iPhone Charging Cables Are Safe: Here's How Hackers Turned Them Into Tools Of Espionage
data.description: Hackers can exploit third-party USB-C cables, embedding hidden electronics like Wi-Fi antennas to spy on iPhone users, emphasizing the need to use official accessories and avoid public charging ports.

data.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX Gets Pentagon Contract To Extend Ukraine's Access To Starshield: Report
data.description: Elon Musk's rocket manufacturing company SpaceX has reportedly bagged a Pentagon contract to expand Ukraine's access to Starshield.
